'''鈭歮-g-r-th''' ('''kamagrethoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:landslide|landslide]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-g-r-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:landslide|landslide]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歮-g-r-th
|-
! Lemma
| kamagrethoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thimagrethoko|thimagrethoko]] || [[word:jimagrethoko|jimagrethoko]] || [[word:shimagrethoko|shimagrethoko]] || [[word:kimagrethoko|kimagrethoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthumagrethoko|thuthumagrethoko]] || [[word:jujumagrethoko|jujumagrethoko]] || [[word:shushumagrethoko|shushumagrethoko]] || [[word:kukumagrethoko|kukumagrethoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thumagrethoko|thumagrethoko]] || [[word:jumagrethoko|jumagrethoko]] || [[word:shumagrethoko|shumagrethoko]] || [[word:kumagrethoko|kumagrethoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thumagrethoko|thumagrethoko]] || [[word:jumagrethoko|jumagrethoko]] || [[word:shumagrethoko|shumagrethoko]] || [[word:kumagrethoko|kumagrethoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:themagrethoko|themagrethoko]] || [[word:jemagrethoko|jemagrethoko]] || [[word:shemagrethoko|shemagrethoko]] || [[word:kemagrethoko|kemagrethoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothomagrethoko|thothomagrethoko]] || [[word:jojomagrethoko|jojomagrethoko]] || [[word:shoshomagrethoko|shoshomagrethoko]] || [[word:kokomagrethoko|kokomagrethoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thomagrethoko|thomagrethoko]] || [[word:jomagrethoko|jomagrethoko]] || [[word:shomagrethoko|shomagrethoko]] || [[word:komagrethoko|komagrethoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thomagrethoko|thomagrethoko]] || [[word:jomagrethoko|jomagrethoko]] || [[word:shomagrethoko|shomagrethoko]] || [[word:komagrethoko|komagrethoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙magrethoko|th忙magrethoko]] || [[word:j忙magrethoko|j忙magrethoko]] || [[word:sh忙magrethoko|sh忙magrethoko]] || [[word:k忙magrethoko|k忙magrethoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathamagrethoko|thathamagrethoko]] || [[word:jajamagrethoko|jajamagrethoko]] || [[word:shashamagrethoko|shashamagrethoko]] || [[word:kakamagrethoko|kakamagrethoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thamagrethoko|thamagrethoko]] || [[word:jamagrethoko|jamagrethoko]] || [[word:shamagrethoko|shamagrethoko]] || [[word:kamagrethoko|kamagrethoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thamagrethoko|thamagrethoko]] || [[word:jamagrethoko|jamagrethoko]] || [[word:shamagrethoko|shamagrethoko]] || [[word:kamagrethoko|kamagrethoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shamagrethithi|shamagrethithi]] || [[word:shamagrethiji|shamagrethiji]] || [[word:shamagrethishi|shamagrethishi]] || [[word:shamagrethiki|shamagrethiki]]
|-

|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:shamagreth茂f|shamagreth茂f]] || [[word:shamagreth茂f|shamagreth茂f]] || [[word:shamagreth茂f|shamagreth茂f]] || [[word:shamagreth茂f|shamagreth茂f]]
|-

|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:shamagreth茂f|shamagreth茂f]] || [[word:shamagreth茂f|shamagreth茂f]] || [[word:shamagreth茂f|shamagreth茂f]] || [[word:shamagreth茂f|shamagreth茂f]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:shamagreth茂f|shamagreth茂f]] || [[word:shamagreth茂f|shamagreth茂f]] || [[word:shamagreth茂f|shamagreth茂f]] || [[word:shamagreth茂f|shamagreth茂f]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:shamagreth忙th忙|shamagreth忙th忙]] || [[word:shamagreth忙j忙|shamagreth忙j忙]] || [[word:shamagreth忙sh忙|shamagreth忙sh忙]] || [[word:shamagreth忙k忙|shamagreth忙k忙]]
|-

|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:shamagrethatha|shamagrethatha]] || [[word:shamagrethaja|shamagrethaja]] || [[word:shamagrethasha|shamagrethasha]] || [[word:shamagrethaka|shamagrethaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:shamagrethathaf|shamagrethathaf]] || [[word:shamagrethajaf|shamagrethajaf]] || [[word:shamagrethashaf|shamagrethashaf]] || [[word:shamagrethakaf|shamagrethakaf]]
|}
